query: NATO Defence Industry Forum 2026 procurement deals total value contracts announced

mako.raw:
{"query":"NATO Defence Industry Forum 2026 procurement deals total value contracts announced","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1121,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.nato.int/en/news-and-events/articles/news/2026/07/07/tens-of-billions-in-new-procurements-revealed-at-the-nato-summit-defence-industry-forum-in-ankara","title":"Tens of billions in new procurements revealed at the NATO Summit Defence Industry Forum in Ankara | NATO News","content":"Major new procurements were announced at the NATO Summit Defence Industry Forum on Tuesday (7 July 2026) which will boost defence production and innovation across the Alliance, and provide new capabilities to strengthen NATO’s deterrence and defence.
NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte announced the delivery of the 10th Airbus A330 MRTT aircraft to the Multinational Multi-Role Tanker Transport Fleet; the procurement of Northrop Grumman Triton uncrewed aircraft to enhance NATO’s maritime surveillance; and the joint procurement of Saab GlobalEye aircraft to modernise NATO’s airborne early warning and control capabilities."},{"url":"https://www.euractiv.com/news/nato-industry-forum-at-least-50bn-announced-in-new-deals/","title":"NATO Industry Forum: At least $50bn announced in new deals | Euractiv","content":"The 36th NATO Heads of State and Government Summit, hosted by Turkiye, commenced with the forum where transatlantic defense production and related investments will be at the forefront.
At least $50 billion (€43.7 billion) in new defence deals were announced at NATO’s Defence Industry Forum on Tuesday, a NATO official confirmed, including the launch of a new multinational strategic airlift fleet and plans to replace the alliance’s ageing early-warning aircraft with a European platform.
Belgium, Croatia, France, Poland, Spain, Turkey and the United Kingdom launched a new multinational High Visibility Project for a fleet of Airbus A400M military aircraft.
NATO allies have pledged to invest more than $40 billion (€35 billion) in counter-drone capabilities over the next five years and to increase the number of trained drone operators fivefold by the end of 2027, the alliance announced.
The allies are Canada, Czechia, Denmark, Finland, Greece, Norway, Slovakia, Sweden and Turkey for a total value of $1.6 billion (€1.4 billion)."},{"url":"https://www.nato.int/en/news-and-events/events/event-programmes/2026/07/2026-ankara-nsdif","title":"NATO Summit Defence Industry Forum, 07-Jul-2026 | NATO Event","content":"The NATO Summit Defence Industry Forum (NSDIF26), NATO’s premier high-level event on transatlantic defence production, investment and innovation, took place on 7 July 2026 in Ankara, Türkiye.
12:45 Keynote speeches by NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte, Vice-President of Türkiye Cevdet Yılmaz and Minister of Defence of Türkiye Yaşar Güler
13:10 Navigating the Ramp-Up: A Conversation with Industry
Plenary session with CEO of STARK Defence Uwe Horstmann, President of Lockheed Martin International Jay Pitman and CEO of BAE Systems Charles Woodburn.
15:10 Call for Action: Strategic Investments in Defence and Security Opening remarks by NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte"},{"url":"https://www.lemonde.fr/en/international/article/2026/07/08/on-the-first-day-of-the-nato-summit-in-ankara-rutte-unveils-a-wave-of-defense-contracts-worth-billions-of-euros_6755255_4.html","title":"On day 1 of summit in Ankara, NATO unveils defense contracts worth billions","content":"For defense industries in Europe and the United States, the first day of the NATO summit in Ankara, on Tuesday, July 7, feels like Christmas with a flood of contracts.
According to a NATO official, all contracts and orders placed by the allies over recent months add up to an aggregate total of at least $50 billion (€43 billion).
Within this surge of contracts, more than half of the €43 billion involves investments in European air and missile defense, according to NATO."}]}

We are very pleased to have so many representatives from our Allies, industry and the press here with us this morning.","score":0.8752871,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.nato.int/en/news-and-events/articles/news/2026/07/07/tens-of-billions-in-new-procurements-revealed-at-the-nato-summit-defence-industry-forum-in-ankara","title":"Tens of billions in new procurements revealed at the NATO Summit Defence Industry Forum in Ankara | NATO News","content":"## Download NATO’s broadcast-quality video content free of charge. ## Access NATO’s broadcast-quality video content free of charge. Over £4 billion invested in next-generation fighter","score":0.8412138,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://wtvbam.com/2026/07/07/factbox-defence-companies-sign-deals-at-nato-industry-forum","title":"Factbox-Defence companies sign deals at NATO industry forum | WTVB | 1590 AM · 95.5 FM | The Voice of Branch County","content":"# Factbox-Defence companies sign deals at NATO industry forum. July 7 (Reuters) – Defence companies from NATO member states gathered in Ankara on Tuesday for an industry forum held alongside the alliance’s annual summit, where ​several defence cooperation and procurement agreements were expected ‌to be announced. Swedish defence equipment maker Saab said NATO will begin formal negotiations on the acquisition of up to 10 GlobalEye airborne early warning and control aircraft. Lockheed Martin and Rheinmetall signed a memorandum of understanding on Tuesday to jointly ​produce ATACMS missiles in Germany, a move that would mark the first manufacture of the short-range ballistic missile outside ⁠the United States. Separately, the United ⁠States will establish a maintenance facility in ​Europe for Lockheed Martin’s advanced PAC-3 air defence missile, U.S. Undersecretary ​of Defense Michael Duffey said on Tuesday. NATO will launch a ⁠strategic airlift fleet of Airbus A400M transport planes ​and ‌expand its existing A330 MRTT tanker and ​transport fleet by ⁠one aircraft, Rutte said.","score":0.81204927,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.24,"request_id":"f79f012b-a0b9-4f40-a320-06f28b7cf267"}
